name: dadocar-deidentification-job
description: Azure Function App: LGPD retention/de-identification job (Art. 15/16). Timer (daily) + HTTP trigger. Anonymizes PII in api_request_logs, deletes old vehicle consultations, and (opt-in) anonymizes inactive accounts. DRY-RUN by default; set RETENTION_APPLY=1 to execute. Mirrors apps/webclient/src/lib/lgpd/retention.ts.
